# MASH E-Commerce - Test Coverage Expansion Plan

> **Goal**: Expand test coverage from 54% to 70%+ statements
> **Status**: IN-PROGRESS
> **Started**: 2026-02-27
> **PRD File**: `prd-test-coverage.json`
> **Baseline**: 54.07% statements | 43.94% branches | 49.87% functions | 53.9% lines

| Lines | 53.9% | 70%+ | -16.1% |
